welcome.title: Welcome to NMS Optimizer!
welcome.description: A quick start guide to help you get the most out of this tool:
welcome.item2: Click or double-tap a slot to mark it Supercharged.
welcome.item3: Ctrl-click (Windows) / ⌘-click (Mac) / tap (Mobile) to toggle a slot active or inactive.
welcome.item4: Use row toggles to enable or disable entire rows (disabled once modules are placed).
welcome.item5: Use the module selection button to add or remove modules.
welcome.item6: Toggle Focus Mode to minimize visual distractions and optimize font legibility for a clearer experience.
welcome.viewInstructions: For more information, <1>see the complete instructions</1>.

optimizationAlert.insufficientSpace: There's not a large enough window to effectively place the selected modules for <1>{{technologyName}}</1>. This usually happens when too many technologies are selected in your layout.
optimizationAlert.forceOptimizeSuggestion: You can try <1>"Force Optimize"</1> for a more intensive solve, but it may fail to find an optimal layout. Consider reordering your technologies or selecting fewer to improve the results.

shareLink.tip: Tip: Open the link and Bookmark the page to easily return to this layout later.

footer.supportPrompt: Free & ad-free. If this helped you, consider supporting us with

recommendedBuilds.summary: Technologies with <1>fixed Supercharged slots</1> support <5>recommended builds</5>.

adjacencyBonus.name: What is an adjacency bonus in No Man's Sky?
adjacencyBonus.answer: When you place compatible technology modules next to each other, they receive a stat boost. Modules of the same type that share an edge get a percentage increase to their effectiveness. The more edges shared, the bigger the bonus.

superchargedSlots.name: What are supercharged slots and how do they work?
superchargedSlots.answer: Supercharged slots provide a massive multiplier to the base stats of any technology module placed within them. This boost is applied on top of normal adjacency bonuses, making their placement critical for high-performance builds.

maximizeBonus.name: How do I maximize adjacency bonuses and supercharged slots?
maximizeBonus.answer: To get the highest stats, group similar technologies in a square or 'L' shape and place your most powerful modules (like the main weapon or core engine) in supercharged slots that are adjacent to other modules in the group.

calculation.name: How does NMS Optimizer find the best technology layout?
calculation.answer: The optimizer uses advanced algorithms to explore thousands of possible arrangements in seconds. It scores each layout based on adjacency bonuses, supercharged slot multipliers, and module-specific weights to find the mathematical optimum for your gear.

platforms.name: What gear and ship types does NMS Optimizer support?
platforms.answer: NMS Optimizer supports all major gear: Starships (including Sentinel and Living ships), Corvettes, Multitools, Exosuits, Exocraft, and Freighters.

moduleSelection.title: {{techName}} MODULE SELECTION
moduleSelection.warning:
Default Corvette selections are suggestions. Procedural upgrade modules generally provide greater benefit than cosmetic items or reactor upgrades and should be prioritized.

Use Select All to maximize this technology; however, most layouts only have room for 3–4 fully maxed technologies.
moduleSelection.cosmeticInfo: Suggested cosmetic modules can provide a small stat boost, but they shouldn’t limit your design ideas. For a good solve, just match the same number of cosmetic modules on your Corvette.
moduleSelection.trailsInfo: Starship Trails have changed with v6.2 (Remnant Update)! In most cases, select no more than three Starship Trails. The Tentacled Figurine to does not boost in-atmosphere speed! Starship Trails are applied in priority order, with [P1] Chromatic having the highest priority.
moduleSelection.description: Suggested modules are selected by default. You can add or remove specific modules to customize this technology's optimization.

seo.mainPageTitle: NMS Optimizer: Tech Layout & Adjacency Bonus Calculator
seo.appDescription: Optimize No Man's Sky tech layouts with advanced algorithms. Maximize adjacency bonuses and supercharged slot boosts for Starships, Multitools, and more.
seo.keywords: NMS Optimizer, No Man's Sky, adjacency bonus, supercharged slots, NMS layout tool, starship tech layout, multitool build, supercharged slot calculator
seo.instructionsPageTitle: NMS Optimizer: How to Optimize Your Tech Layout
seo.instructionsDescription: Learn how to use the grid, manage supercharged slots, and understand the Theta/Tau/Sigma module ranking system for optimal No Man's Sky builds.
seo.aboutPageTitle: NMS Optimizer: About the Optimization Algorithms
seo.aboutDescription: Discover how NMS Optimizer uses advanced algorithms and a high-performance Rust solver to calculate the absolute best module placements for your gear.
seo.changelogPageTitle: NMS Optimizer: Latest Features and Updates
seo.changelogDescription: Stay updated with the latest NMS Optimizer features, bug fixes, and algorithm improvements. See what's new in the best No Man's Sky layout optimization tool.
seo.userstatsPageTitle: NMS Optimizer: Community Meta & Tech Stats
seo.userstatsDescription: Explore the current No Man's Sky build meta. See the most popular supercharged technologies based on thousands of community optimization sessions.
seo.translationPageTitle: Help Translate NMS Optimizer: Join the Team
seo.translationDescription: Contribute to the No Man's Sky community by helping translate the NMS Optimizer. Make the best layout tool accessible to travelers in every language.
seo.privacyDescription: Read about our commitment to your privacy. We use anonymous analytics to improve the optimizer without ever tracking your personal identity or save data.
seo.performanceDescription: Real-time performance metrics and Core Web Vitals for the NMS Optimizer application.
seo.ogImageAlt: A detailed screenshot of the NMS Optimizer application showing an optimized technology grid with high adjacency bonuses.

restrictions.title: Action Unavailable
restrictions.superchargedLimit: You can only have up to four supercharged slots.
restrictions.superchargedFixed: Supercharged slot locations for Exocraft and Exosuits can't be changed.
restrictions.gridFixed: Slot locations are fixed for Exocraft and can’t be changed.
restrictions.moduleLocked: Slots with modules can’t be changed. Remove the module group first.
restrictions.rowLimit: Supercharged slots can only be placed in the first four rows.
